0.text: TCD 003/2019 Panther Real Estate Development LLC v Modern Executive Systems Contracting LLC

1.text: JULY 07, 2024 TECHNOLOGY AND CONSTRUCTION DIVISION - ORDERS

3.text: THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE COURTS

4.text: IN THE COURT OF FIRST INSTANCE

12.text: UPON the Judgment of Justice Sir Richard Field dated 28 September 2022 in TCD-003-2019

13.text: AND UPON the Order of Justice Sir Richard Field dated 3 July 2023

14.text: AND UPON the Judgment of the Court of Appeal dated 12 May 2023 in CA-016-2022

15.text: AND UPON the Consent Order dated 6 September 2023

16.text: AND UPON the Order of Justice Wayne Martin dated 7 November 2023

17.text: AND UPON the Parties having agreed to settle the issue of costs in TCD-003-2019 and CA-016- 2022 and the fi nal sum owed by the Claimant to the Defendant in relation to TCD-003-2019 in the terms set out in the Schedule of this Order

18.text: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED BY CONSENT THAT:

19.text: 1. The Claimant shall make payment to the Defendant in the sum of AED 2,632,642.71 within 14 days of this Order in full and fi nal settlement of all claims arisen between the Parties, including all future claims and claims as to costs (the “Settlement Sum”).

20.text: 2. Upon the payment of the Settlement Sum, the proceedings in TCD-003-2019 shall be deemed terminated and shall be closed.

21.text: 3. There shall be no order as to costs.

22.text:
Issued by:   
Delvin Sumo   
Assistant Registrar   
Date of issue: 7 July 2024   
At: 12pm
